decision_summary.rationale: The lambda function has 0 invocations in the last 30 days, making the provisioned concurrency unnecessary and a waste of resources.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The lambda function order-processor-prod has provisioned concurrency of 5 but has not been invoked in the last 30 days. This means that the provisioned concurrency is not being utilized and is resulting in unnecessary costs. Removing the provisioned concurrency will eliminate the $37.84/month charge and allow the function to scale on-demand.

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report covers the key facts and numbers accurately but the rationale is thin — it only cites zero invocations without explaining that removing provisioned concurrency leaves the function intact and only affects cold start latency, and it misses noting that data_loss_acknowledged is false because no data is stored in provisioned concurrency.
